prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-GREYNYLONSPATSET-2PC-BUN Product Type: FOOD_SPATULA Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 2pc Grey Nylon Kitchen Utensils Spatula Set with Ergonomic Wooden Handles High Heat Resistance Description: Want to step up your cooking, baking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille nylon slotted spatula and solid spatula cooking utensils set that feature a stylish wood and charcoal grey finish. These kitchen utensils are made with high heat resistant nylon that will stand up to all the wear and tear your kitchen can dish out!

Both the slotted spatula and solid spatula feature sturdy handles made of durable wood so you can count on them to last; and the ergonomic handle design with top soft grip will provide comfort and help prevent slippage during use, giving you maximum control when taking on your favorite recipes. The handle features a slot for easy hanging storage if preferred to drawer storage.

Every kitchen needs a reliable cooing spatulas for baking, serving and cooking. With the Beille high heat resistance nylon spatulas, you can cook, bake, serve and food prep in comfort and style for many meals to come!

Dishwasher safe. Search Terms: Kitchen utensils set; cooking baking supplies; meal food prep; kitchen starter set; serveware; house warming gifts new home; restaurant equipment; bakeware; kitchen gadgets tools; culinary gift ideas; spatula; spatula set Features: - 2PC SPATULA SET: Kitchen utensils set includes one slotted spatula and one solid spatula, making them a great and reliable cooking utensils starter set in any kitchen - HEAT RESISTANT NYLON: Lightweight kitchen utensils are made of durable nylon which will not cause harmful chemical contamination of foods; kitchen utensil can withstand high cooking temperatures - ERGONOMIC HANDLE: Durable wood handles with soft rubber top makes for a comfortable grip when cooking giving you maximum control as you take on your favorite recipes; the top handle features a handy slot for easy hang storage if preferred; neutral grey color will style easily with any kitchen decor - DISHWASHER SAFE: Must have kitchen essentials items to add to your arsenal of kitchen utensils for cooking, baking, meal and food prep and more; conveniently dishwasher safe for quick clean up - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13 x 3.25 x 2.0 inhces; Set Weight: 0.35lbs; Color: Grey/Wood === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 2pc Grey Nylon Spatula Set with Wooden Handles

tokens.name: Nylon Spatula Set with Wooden Handles

anthropic.title_differentiation: Slotted And Solid Spatula, Heat Resistant Nylon, Ergonomic Wood Handles, Dishwasher Safe, Hanging Storage

openai.title_differentiation: Slotted And Solid, High Heat Resistant Nylon, Ergonomic Wood Handles, Dishwasher Safe, Hanging Loop
